title: Complete API Documentation
description: Complete documentation for both Official and Web APIs

title: GET /Util/Search/Results
description: Advanced search - This endpoint returns a list of search results.

title: GET /:model_name/ListFilterConfig
description: Search modificators - This endpoint returns filters configuration for API Index.

title: GET /Util/Search/Suggestions
description: Search suggestions - This endpoint returns a list of suggested search queries for the provided search string.

title: GET /Util/Game/NameMatch
description: Games by name - This endpoint returns a list of games containing the search query in their names.

title: GET /Util/Generic/Tags
description: Tags by text - This endpoint returns a list of tags containing the search query in their names.

title: GET /Util/Homepage/Submissions
description: Latest (all games) - This endpoint returns a list of the latest submissions displayed on the homepage (all games are incl

title: GET /Game/:id/Subfeed
description: Latest (game) - This endpoint returns a list of the latest submissions for the specified Game ID.

title: GET /:model_name/Index
description: Latest (section) - This endpoint returns a list of records matching the given criteria.

title: GET /Member/:id/SubFeed
description: Latest (member) - This endpoint returns a list of latest submissions of Member ID.

title: GET /Util/List/Featured
description: Featured - This endpoint returns a list of featured submissions.

title: GET /Game/:id/TopSubs
description:
Top (game) - This endpoint returns top submissions displayed on the game's homepage.

title: GET /Util/Homepage/TopGames
description: Trending, Classics, New - This endpoint returns lists of Trending, Classics, New games.

title: GET /Util/Game/NameMatch
description: By name - This endpoint returns a list of Games containing the value of query parameter _sName in their names.

title: GET /Game/ListFilterConfig
description: Sort options and filters - This endpoint returns a set of available sort options and filters.

title: GET /Game/Index
description:
By sort options and filters - This endpoint returns a list of Games.

To sort results provide a value for _sSort

description:
Top submissions - This endpoint returns top submissions displayed on the homepage of the specified Game ID.

description: Featured - This endpoint returns a list of submissions that were previously featured on the homepage of the spe

title: GET /Game/:id/CommunitySpotlight
description: Community Spotlight - This endpoint returns a set of submissions, studios and clubs that have gained popularity recently f

title: GET /Game/:id/Subfeed
description: Advanced search - This endpoint returns a list of submissions for the specified Game ID.

title: GET /Game/:id/ProfilePage
description: Multiple Properties (1) - This endpoint returns multiple properties for the specified Game ID.

title: GET /Game/:id
description: Multiple Properties (2) - This endpoint returns multiple properties for the specified Game ID.

title: GET /Game/:id/GetStartedPage
description: Detailed information - This endpoint returns detailed information for the specified Game ID.

title: GET /Game/:id/Rules
description: Additional rules - This endpoint returns a list of additional rules for the specified Game ID.

title: GET /Util/Generic/Discussions
description: Discussions - This endpoint returns a list of the latest discussions for the specified Game ID.

title: GET /:sectionSlug/Categories
description: Multiple RootCategories - Returns a list of the root categories by Section Slug.

title: GET /ModCategory/:rootCategoryId/SubCategories
description: Multiple SubCategories - Returns a list of the sub categories by Root Category ID.

title: GET /Util/Generic/Discussions
description: Multiple Discussions - Returns a list of the latests discussions.

title: GET /Util/Homepage/Features
description: Features - Returns a list of featured submissions.

title: GET /Util/Homepage/CommunitySpotlight
description: CommunitySpotlight - Returns a set of submissions, studios and clubs that have gained popularity recently.

title: GET /Member/:id/AwardedBounties
description: Awarded Bounties - Returns a list of submissions the specified Member ID has been awarded bounties for.

title: GET /Member/:id/ContributedBounties
description: Contributed Bounties - Returns a list of submissions the specified Member ID has contributed bounties for.

title: GET /Member/:id/LikedSubmissions
description: Liked Submissions - Returns a list of submissions liked by a specified Member ID.

title: GET /Member/:id/Medals
description: Medals - Returns a list of medals for a specified Member ID.

title: GET /Member/:id/ParticipatedContests
description: Participated Contests - Returns a list of contests the specified Member ID has participated in.

title: GET /Member/:id/RatedIdeas
description: Rated Ideas - Returns a list of ideas the specified Member ID has rated.

title: GET /Member/:id/SolvedQuestions
description: Solved Questions - Returns a list of questions solved by the specified Member ID.

title: GET /Member/:id/ThankedSubmissions
description: Thanked Submissions - Returns a list of submissions the specified Member ID has thanked.

title: GET /Member/:id/VotedPolls
description: Voted Polls - Returns a list of polls the specified Member ID has voted in.

title: GET /Member/:id/Submissions/Contributions
description: Contributions - Returns a list of submissions where the specified Member ID has been listed in the credits.

title: GET /Member/:id/Submissions/Posts
description: Latest Posts - Returns a list of posts made by a specified Member ID.

title: GET /Ripe/Info
description: Info - This endpoints returns Ripe info.
